creator: Tor.Egge@fast.no
text:
> I installed FreeBSD-4.2 with gnu- and lib-sources. If I try to compile linuxthreads I get following errors:
> 
> don't know how to make libgcc1.c

You need at least src-contrib too.  

Having complete sources unpacked under /usr/src is recommended.

> and if I try make again
> 
> libgcc_r : Makefile exists

A "make clean" is needed before retrying unless you have the latest
version of the linuxthreads port.

- Tor Egge
